titleEn: Highly Skilled Professional — 80+ points, holding HSP (Kodo Senmon-shoku) visa
titleJa: 高度専門職（80点以上・高度専門職ビザ保持者）
notes: Japanese-issued certificates must be dated within 3 months of application.
Documents in foreign languages must include a Japanese translation.
Additional documents may be requested during the review process.
If any required document cannot be submitted, include a written explanation (理由書) with author name and date.
If you previously submitted supporting materials to the Immigration Services Agency, you may apply to reuse them via a document reuse request form (資料転用願出書).

documents.nameJa: 永住許可申請書
documents.nameEn: Permanent Residence Application Form
documents.noteEn: Download from the Immigration Services Agency website.
documents.noteJa: 出入国在留管理庁ホームページからダウンロードできます。

documents.nameJa: 写真（縦4cm×横3cm）
documents.nameEn: Passport-size Photo (4cm × 3cm)
documents.noteEn: Taken within 6 months. Front-facing, no hat, plain background. Under age 16 is exempt.
documents.noteJa: 申請前6か月以内に正面から撮影された無帽、無背景、鮮明なもの。16歳未満の場合は不要。

documents.nameJa: 理由書
documents.nameEn: Reason Statement for Permanent Residence
documents.noteEn: Written explanation of why you need permanent residence. Include author name and date. Attach Japanese translation if written in another language.
documents.noteJa: 永住許可を必要とする理由について、任意の様式に作成者と作成年月日を記載した上で自由な形式で記載。日本語以外で記載する場合は翻訳文が必要。

documents.nameJa: 申請人を含む家族全員（世帯）の住民票
documents.nameEn: Resident Register for All Household Members
documents.noteEn: Omit My Number. Do not omit any other fields.
documents.noteJa: 個人番号（マイナンバー）は省略し、他の事項については省略のないものを提出してください。

documents.nameJa: 職業を証明する資料
documents.nameEn: Proof of Occupation
documents.noteEn: One of: (1) Employment certificate; (2a) Tax return copy or corporate registration certificate + (2b) business license; (3) Written statement and evidence.
documents.noteJa: 在職証明書、確定申告書控えの写し又は当該法人の登記事項証明書、または職業に係る説明書及び立証資料のいずれか。

documents.nameJa: 直近1年分の住民税の課税（又は非課税）証明書
documents.nameEn: Municipal Resident Tax Certificate — most recent 1 year
documents.noteEn: Issued by city/ward/town office. If not available (e.g., within 1 year of arrival), substitute with withholding tax slip or pay stubs. Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteJa: お住まいの市区町村から発行。提出できない場合は給与所得の源泉徴収票または給与明細書等で代替可。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 直近1年分の住民税の納税証明書
documents.nameEn: Municipal Resident Tax Payment Certificate — most recent 1 year

documents.nameJa: 直近1年間において住民税を適正な時期に納めていることを証明する資料
documents.nameEn: Proof of Timely Resident Tax Payments — most recent 1 year
documents.conditionNote: Required only if tax was NOT withheld at source during any part of the past year.
documents.noteEn: Bank passbook copy or receipts.
documents.noteJa: 通帳の写し、領収証書等。

documents.nameJa: 国税の納税証明書（その3）
documents.nameEn: National Tax Payment Certificate — Form 3
documents.noteEn: All 5 national tax types. Issued by Tax Office.
documents.noteJa: 5税目全て。住所地を管轄する税務署から発行。

documents.nameJa: 年金事務所発行の「被保険者記録照会回答票」「被保険者記録照会（納付Ⅰ）」「被保険者記録照会（納付Ⅱ）」
documents.nameEn: Pension Enrollment & Contribution Record (issued by Pension Office)
documents.noteEn: Alternatives: nenkin statement (full record, letter format), Nenkin Net monthly record, or national pension receipts for past 1 year. Redact Basic Pension Number. Confirm no missed or late payments.
documents.noteJa: 代替可：ねんきん定期便（封書形式のみ）、ねんきんネットの各月記録、国民年金保険料領収証書（12か月分）。基礎年金番号は黒塗り。未納・遅延納付がないことを確認してください。

documents.nameJa: 世帯全員分の健康保険被保険者証（写し）
documents.nameEn: Employee Health Insurance Card — All Household Members (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit if currently enrolled in Employee Health Insurance. If enrolled for entire past 1 year, items #12–#14 are not needed.
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗りにして提出。

documents.nameJa: 世帯全員分の国民健康保険被保険者証（写し）
documents.nameEn: National Health Insurance Card — All Household Members (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit if currently enrolled in National Health Insurance.
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗り。

documents.nameJa: 直近1年間の国民健康保険料（税）納付証明書
documents.nameEn: National Health Insurance Premium Payment Certificate — past 1 year
documents.conditionNote: Submit if enrolled in NHI during any part of the past 1 year.
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗り。

documents.nameJa: 直近1年間の国民健康保険料（税）領収証書（写し）
documents.nameEn: National Health Insurance Premium Receipts — past 1 year (copy)
documents.conditionNote: Submit if enrolled in NHI during any part of the past 1 year.
documents.noteEn: Redact insurer number and insured person symbol/number.
documents.noteJa: 保険者番号及び被保険者等記号・番号を黒塗り。

documents.nameJa: 直近1年間の健康保険・厚生年金保険料領収証書（写し）
documents.nameEn: Employee Health & Welfare Pension Insurance Premium Receipts — past 1 year
documents.conditionNote: Submit either #15 or #16 if you operated a social insurance covered business during the past 1 year.

documents.nameJa: 直近1年間の社会保険料納入証明書又は社会保険料納入確認（申請）書
documents.nameEn: Social Insurance Premium Payment Certificate — past 1 year

documents.nameJa: 高度専門職ポイント計算表（永住許可申請の時点のもの）
documents.nameEn: HSP Point Calculation Table — as of the application date
documents.noteEn: Use the calculation table corresponding to your activity category (1号イ / 1号ロ / 1号ハ). Use the table current at the time of application.
documents.noteJa: 活動区分（高度専門職1号イ、ロ、ハ）に応じた計算表を使用。永住許可申請の時点で計算したもの。

documents.nameJa: 高度専門職ポイント計算結果通知書の写し（別記第27号の2様式）
documents.nameEn: HSP Point Calculation Result Notification (Form 27-2) — copy
documents.conditionNote: Submit #18 if you have been recognized as a Highly Skilled Foreign Professional and have resided for 1+ years under that status. Submit #19 instead if you have not received the official notification.
documents.noteEn: This notification is issued when the ISA grants Certificate of Eligibility or status change approval recognizing you as a Highly Skilled Foreign Professional.
documents.noteJa: 「高度人材外国人」と認められて在留資格認定証明書の交付又は在留資格変更許可等を受けた場合に通知されるもの。

documents.nameJa: 高度専門職ポイント計算表（永住許可申請の1年前の時点のもの）
documents.nameEn: HSP Point Calculation Table — as of 1 year before the application date
documents.conditionNote: Submit if you have NOT received the official HSP notification (item #18). Calculate using the current point table but as of 1 year before the application date.
documents.noteEn: Use the activity category corresponding to your visa (1号イ / 1号ロ / 1号ハ).
documents.noteJa: 活動区分（高度専門職1号イ、ロ、ハ）に応じた計算表を使用。永住許可申請の1年前の時点で計算（現在のポイント計算表に基づく）。

documents.nameJa: ポイント計算の各項目に関する疎明資料
documents.nameEn: Supporting Documents for HSP Point Calculation Items
documents.noteEn: Submit evidence confirming the total points are 80+. You do not need to submit evidence for every item — only enough to verify the required score. If you are submitting item #18, supporting evidence for that notification period is not required. See the point calculation table for document examples.
documents.noteJa: ポイントの合計が80点以上であることを確認できる資料を提出。全項目の疎明資料を提出する必要はありません。高度専門職ポイント計算結果通知書（#18）を提出した場合は、当該時点における疎明資料の提出は不要。

documents.nameJa: 資産を証明する資料
documents.nameEn: Proof of Assets
documents.noteEn: One of: (1) Bank passbook copy (web banking screenshots acceptable); (2) Real estate registration certificate; (3) Equivalent.
documents.noteJa: 次のいずれか：(1) 預貯金通帳の写し（Web通帳の画面写し可）、(2) 不動産の登記事項証明書、(3) これらに準ずるもの。

documents.nameJa: 身元保証書
documents.nameEn: Guarantor Letter
documents.noteEn: Guarantor is typically a Japanese national, permanent resident, or special permanent resident.
documents.noteJa: 身元保証人には、通常、日本に居住する日本人、永住者又は特別永住者の方。

documents.nameJa: 身元保証書に係る資料
documents.nameEn: Guarantor Identification Documents
documents.noteEn: Documents verifying the guarantor's identity.
documents.noteJa: 身元保証人の身分事項を明らかにする書類（運転免許証、在留カードの写し等）。

documents.nameJa: 了解書
documents.nameEn: Acknowledgement Letter
documents.noteEn: Download from the Immigration Services Agency website.
documents.noteJa: 出入国在留管理庁ホームページからダウンロードできます。
